label: Market value generator
description: Generates individual items weighted by market value, filtered by trade tag, weapon tag, and apparel tag. Inherits misc-item generation logic from StockGenerator_MiscItems.

tradeTag.label: Trade tag
tradeTag.description: Trade tag that eligible ThingDefs must carry in their tradeTags list.

weaponTag.label: Weapon tag
weaponTag.description: Optional weapon tag filter. When set, only ThingDefs whose weaponTags contain this value are eligible.

apparelTag.label: Apparel tag
apparelTag.description: Optional apparel tag filter. When set, only ThingDefs whose apparel.tags contain this value are eligible.
